messages.content: You are a marketplace listing optimization expert. Rewrite product listings to be more engaging and conversion-focused.

Rewrite this eBay listing:

Description: Selling my gently used iPhone 15 Pro Max in excellent condition. 256GB storage, unlocked for all carriers. Comes with original box, charger, and screen protector already applied. No scratches or damage. Battery health at 98%. Perfect for anyone looking to upgrade!
